# Flamki

> Portfolio of Ayush Singh, a full-stack developer and systems engineer shipping production products, open-source systems work, and blockchain security research.

Canonical URL: https://flamki.com/

## Identity

- Name: Ayush Singh
- Brand/site: Flamki
- Role: Full-Stack Developer and Systems Engineer
- Focus: production full-stack products, multi-agent AI platforms, open-source systems work, and blockchain security.

## Important Pages

- Home and interactive portfolio: https://flamki.com/
- Sitemap: https://flamki.com/sitemap.xml

## Summary

Flamki is the personal portfolio of Ayush Singh. The site presents Ayush as a full-stack developer, systems engineer, open-source contributor, and security researcher, with an interactive chat portfolio for exploring his experience, projects, skills, and contact options.
